rationale: 23 turns clearly exceeds the 14-turn budget (64% over). The agent gathered comprehensive info but made multiple single-fact questions (size+model, HQ+juris, escalation) that could have been batched earlier. The 'Quiet Lawyer' persona was respected with brief turns, but the agent failed to compress phases — 23 turns rather than ≤14 is a material budget failure despite good skip-when-covered (declined Regulatory) and hypothesis-confirm (regulatory corrections).
specific_gaps: Turns 3+5+13+15: Single-fact follow-ups that could have been batched into earlier questions
Turns 7-8: Detailed regulatory corrections took 2 turns; P2.5 could have been structured as 'here's my working list, confirm/correct' for one turn
23 turns total vs 14-turn budget - chronic over-budget despite persona-appropriate brevity
